caption: The video appears to be an end screen or promotional segment encouraging viewers to subscribe to Rahul Gandhi's channel. The background is a soft, gradient blend of pastel colors, creating a calm and inviting atmosphere. At the top, the name "RAHUL GANDHI" is prominently displayed in bold, golden letters. Below this, there is a call-to-action that reads "SUBSCRIBE TO MY CHANNEL," accompanied by a red triangle symbol. On the left side, there is a circular profile picture of Rahul Gandhi with his Twitter handle "@RahulGandhi" next to it. Social media icons for Twitter, Facebook, YouTube, and Instagram are also present, along with the website URL "www.rahulgandhi.in." The overall design is clean and professional, aimed at engaging viewers and directing them to Rahul Gandhi's various online platforms.
